name: @sentropic/design-system-angular
description: Angular components for the Sentropic design system.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @sentropic/design-system-tokens && npm run build -w @sentropic/design-system-themes && ngc -p tsconfig.lib.json && node scripts/copy-styles.mjs
scripts.check: npm run build -w @sentropic/design-system-tokens && npm run build -w @sentropic/design-system-themes && ngc -p tsconfig.lib.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src
